policy: Homepage assembly is manifest-driven so sections can be reordered, added, disabled, or validated without rewriting the orchestrator. The baseline shell is clean and contains no legacy operating-brain sections. Decision Tabs are intentionally parked; the homepage consolidates through five operating sections plus a lightweight trust strip.

baseline.description: Create clean operational HTML shell before sections are injected.

sections.name: Market Regime
sections.description: Top market verdict and macro values.

sections.name: Decision Chart
sections.description: Real SPX working chart with OpenClaw action zones and supporting indicators.

sections.name: Cross-Asset Lens
sections.description: SPX, QQQ, TLT, BTC and VIX confirmation lenses that support or contradict the decision chart.

sections.name: Strategy Route
sections.description: Cross-asset lens translated into portfolio permission, risk budget and opportunity promotion rules.

sections.name: Holdings
sections.description: Portfolio positions mapped to ruled zones and regime support, with strategy-route permissions applied.

sections.name: Opportunity
sections.description: Opportunity candidates and near-miss diagnostics filtered by evidence, asymmetry, and active strategy route.

sections.name: Market Tape
sections.description: Confirmation board for signals that support or contradict the chart regime.

sections.name: Trust / Data Quality
sections.description: Lightweight trust strip for source authority, route consistency, and promoted-opportunity warnings.

cleanup.description: Remove old/legacy homepage sections and duplicate nav links after operational sections are injected.
